articles.title: Luka was doing exactly what you guys asked for towards the end which is defending and playmaking despite not scoring.
articles.original_title: Luka was doing exactly what you guys asked for towards the end which is defending and playmaking despite not scoring.
articles.summary: I find it really annoying how this entire game, whenever Luka is off the court they lose more. The start of 4th quarter it seemed like the game was quickly slipping away, and Luka had to come back and played 40 minutes in total. 40 minutes and net rating was 0 in a 7-point loss. He wasn't chucking shots, and the team made it to 1-point with like 2 minutes left too. At this point I don't know what he can do either. By the way his whistle has been shit too since February. articles.title: Aicher finishes second in downhill to cut Vonn and Shiffrin leads in World Cup standings
articles.original_title: Aicher finishes second in downhill to cut Vonn and Shiffrin leads in World Cup standings
articles.summary: With neither injured Lindsey Vonn nor Mikaela Shiffrin starting a World Cup downhill on Friday, Emma Aicher seized her chance to cut the American superstars’ leads in the season-long standings.  Aicher, the Olympic downhill silver medalist, placed second — just 0.01 behind first-time winner Laura Pirovano, pushing Olympic champion Breezy Johnson down to third — and reduced Vonn’s lead in the downhill points race to just 14 with two races left.  Vonn’s hugely successful World Cup season at age 41

articles.title: A guide to the six sports at the Milan Cortina Winter Paralympics
articles.original_title: A guide to the six sports at the Milan Cortina Winter Paralympics
articles.summary: With 665 Para athletes and 79 sets of medals to be awarded, Milan Cortina will feature a record number of athletes and medals.  In the skiing sports — Para alpine skiing, Para biathlon, Para cross-country skiing — athletes compete in one of three categories: standing, sitting (on a sit-ski or monoski) or vision impaired (who race following a guide connected via radio).
